zh.lifeSummary: 當Joanna Sandys於大約1405年出生在英國時，她的父親Walter Sandes38歲，母親Agnes Warrener26歲。她於1414年6月之前與William Brocas結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joanna Sandys于大约1405年出生在英国时，她的父亲Walter Sandes38岁，母亲Agnes Warrener26岁。她于1414年6月之前与William Brocas结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Sandys
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Sands
meanings: English and Scottish: topographic name from Middle English sandes ‘sands’, for someone who lived at or near a sandy place, or a habitational name from a place so named, such as Sands in Carlisle (Cumberland) or Sands Cottages in West Hoathly (Sussex). See Sand , of which Sands may sometimes be a plural form or a variant, with excrescent -s. Compare also Sandes and Sandys .

History: Comfort Sands, a revolutionary patriot born in 1748 at what is now Sands’ Point, Long Island, NY, was descended from James Sand(y)s (1622–95), who emigrated from Reading, Berkshire, England, to Plymouth, MA, and followed Anne Hutchinson to Westchester County, NY, and subsequently RI. In 1661 he settled on Block Island, RI.

nameMeanings.name: Joanna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form, Io(h)anna, of Greek Iōanna, the feminine equivalent of Iōannēs ( see John ). In the New Testament, this name is borne by a woman who was one of Jesus's followers (Luke 8:3; 24:10). She was the wife of the steward of the household of King Herod Antipas. The name was regularly used throughout the Middle Ages in most parts of Europe as a feminine equivalent of John , but in England it has only been in common use as a vernacular given name since the 19th century. Celebrated British bearers of the name include the novelist Joanna Trollope ( b. 1943 ), the actress Joanna Lumley ( b. 1946 ), and the concert pianist Joanna McGregor ( b. 1959 ).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Joanna Sandys was born about 1405, in England, her father, Walter Sandes, was 38 and her mother, Agnes Warrener, was 26. She married William Brocas before June 1414. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joanna Sandys est née environ 1405, à Angleterre, son père, Walter Sandes, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Agnes Warrener, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé William Brocas avant juin 1414. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joanna Sandys um 1405 in England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Walter Sandes 38 und ihre Mutter Agnes Warrener 26. Sie hat vor Juni 1414 William Brocas geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joanna Sandys è nata il circa 1405 nel England, sua padre, Walter Sandes, aveva 38 anni e sua madre, Agnes Warrener, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato William Brocas prima del giugno 1414. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie.

ja.lifeSummary: Joanna Sandysが約1405年にイギリスで生まれた時，父Walter Sandesは38歳，母Agnes Warrenerは26歳であった。1414年6月以前にWilliam Brocasと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Joanna Sandys(이)가 대략 1405년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Walter Sandes(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes Warrener(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1414년 6월 이전 William Brocas(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joanna Sandys nasceu aproximadamente 1405, em Inglaterra, seu pai, Walter Sandes, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Warrener, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com William Brocas antes junho de 1414. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joanna Sandys родилась около 1405 г. в местности Англия, её отцу по имени Walter Sandes было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Warrener, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Brocas перед июнь 1414 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joanna Sandys nació aproximadamente 1405, en Inglaterra, su papá, Walter Sandes, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Agnes Warrener, tenía 26 años. Se casó con William Brocas antes de junio de 1414. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas.
